issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as network failures or invalid input.
Only one code example is provided, lacking multiple realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: selector-performance-rerenders
scenarios.rationale: Both responses correctly recommend per-field selectors to avoid unnecessary re-renders; the treatment mirrors the skill's exact phrasing about 'automatic re-render only when selected state changes' but the baseline covers the core fix adequately.

scenarios.name: persist-immer-devtools-stack
scenarios.rationale: The treatment uses the skill's exact curried `create<T>()(...)` TypeScript generic syntax and provides the named devtools label, while the baseline gets the middleware composition order right but misses the curried generic form and devtools name option.
